name: Jay Reatard
description:
'''James Lee Lindsey Jr.''' (May 1, 1980 – January 12, 2010), known professionally as '''Jay Reatard''', was an American musician from [[Memphis, Tennessee]]. He was signed to [[Matador Records]]. He released recordings as a solo artist and as a member of [[the Reatards]] and [[Lost Sounds]].
{{toclimit|3}}
